name: Laura Loomer
subject: The impact of a President
body:
One couple I met were the Swensens. Mr. and Mrs. Swensen were life-long Democrats and recently switched to the Republican Party!
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364679-854627-4870408-42f8aea291-f2769cbfb9)
Patriot,

Happy President’s Day!

Over the weekend I was with a team of volunteers gathering petitions at a gun show and met some incredible Americans!

One couple I met were the Swensens. Mr. and Mrs. Swensen were life-long Democrats and recently switched to the Republican Party!

**Mr. Swensen had been a member of the Democrat Party for 50 years! And made the switch to the GOP just last week!**

[Watch the video here!](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364679-854627-4870407-557e5f0340-f2769cbfb9)

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364679-854627-4870407-557e5f0340-f2769cbfb9)
When I spoke to Mr. Swensen more about his decision, it came down to the progress made by one man, President Donald J. Trump.

Partisan politics aside, Americans are intelligent and they’re able to recognize progress when they see it.

Americans are not looking for politicians to simply fall in line with their party of choice, they’re looking for someone who will lead the nation in a way that will make their lives better.

Mr. and Mrs. Swensen recognized that in President Trump, and **I was honored to have their support as they signed my petitions.**

2020 will be an amazing year as Americans wake up to the reality of progress, and I’m honored to be part of it.

Thanks so much for all that you do and [please watch the video here](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364679-854627-4870407-557e5f0340-f2769cbfb9).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

* * *
Attorney General William Barr has failed his responsibility to this country. He has been complicit in this president's lawlessness. **The next step is clear.****William Barr must resign.** Even before the events that have unfolded this past week, Barr has continuously sided with a lawless president, ignoring his responsibilities to the rule of law. Barr's interference in Roger Stone's case was the final straw. It is clear he is acting as a political puppet for the president. That is not how our justice department is supposed to work. We cannot stand by as this administration wreaks havoc on our institutions. We must demand justice. **[Sign your name if you agree William Barr should resign.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903cf/55b66746/22fac19a/80fdccc/2975594081/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/barr-resign/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-02-barr-resign-email")** Enough corruption. We must call it out at every turn. Team Kennedy [Sign if you agree](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903cf/55b66746/22fac19a/80fdccc/2975594081/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/barr-resign/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-02-barr-resign-email") |

Doc is running for U.S. Senate to leave Kansas and America better than he found it. He’s ready to roll up his sleeves and fight for President Trump’s agenda on day one, because that’s exactly what he’s been doing for the last three years.

And we’re seeing the results. **Last week, a new poll showed that 61% of Americans say they’re better off now than they were three years ago! **

While Democrats have obsessed over impeachment shams and Russian hoaxes, President Trump and Doc have focused on lifting up Kansans and all Americans.

[**Do you think President Trump and Doc’s agenda is working? Take this ONE-QUESTION survey now and let us know! **](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=67f2764b9d&e=0b94e583bc)

[What do you think? Do you think President Trump and Doc’s agenda is working? Take our one-question survey now! We’ll be sharing the results with Doc in the days ahead. ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=e157b8dc21&e=0b94e583bc)**

name: Chris Putnam
subject: Kay Granger is afraid.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|

Friend, You may have gotten a text message from Kay Granger today as she tries to lie and distract you from her liberal past. Behind in the polls and unable to defend her own record, **Kay Granger has chosen to take a page out of the Democrat playbook and run a Fake News smear campaign. ** Our Republican primary voters are smart and understand this is a desperate tactic to take the discussion off her liberal voting record and Granger's outrageous Panther Island corruption and nepotism. **After 24-years and 12 terms in Washington, our voters know exactly who Ms. Granger is and why it 's time for her to go.** The people of Texas need a conservative outsider who is willing to fight for President Trump's agenda and our shared values, not a member of the D.C. swamp. In Congress, I will end the reign of the political establishment by voting for term limits, fighting against government bailouts, and eliminating wasteful spending. **I 'm not afraid to take on Kay Granger and her Washington lobbyist friends, no matter what they try to say. [Will you stand with me against her lies by donating $10 day?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/3mW6HtI2bkUEyVTYd22nKg/W0bbY9q8vXYJXnSB48E76A)** [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/BSBhuL03At5XGKMtcSZHrQ/W0bbY9q8vXYJXnSB48E76A) [**We still have time to tell the people of Texas ' 12th district who Kay Granger really is. name: Defeat Senator Cornyn
subject: it's time to send him AND his Washington cronies packing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. John Cornyn has spent years doing Mitch McConnell's dirty work and putting special interests ahead of Texans.

|
---

---
Peter,
Sen. John Cornyn has spent years doing Mitch McConnell's dirty work and putting special interests ahead of Texans. Take a look at his record and you'll see why **[we need your support to send him AND his Washington cronies packing this November:](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905bf/7f51f7bc/4dcc931b/4ef1b922/298464143/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-feb-mm-2020?refcode=email_20200217.3nd__933__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
* Sen. Cornyn voted _18 times_ to **repeal the Affordable Care Act** , and now he supports a lawsuit that would strike it down -- including protections for people with pre-existing conditions.
* He's stood in the way of _every meaningful measure_ to defend our communities from **gun violence.**
* He _refuses_ to take action to protect our state from the growing threat of **climate change.**

**With early voting in the primary starting TOMORROW, will you rush a donation to help us reach our $20,000 mid-month goal and BEAT Sen. Cornyn?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Bloomberg 2020
subject: Let’s bring "Presidential" back

body:
In honor of Presidents Day

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=e6598745c7614869975808d3170aedfa&_e=4etJOCJvhhYMM_W-z0Zd8Kwnd0y8mucGqIPIRzVke_c-rXbyj5yizIh1xmXK94Rb5xvdNzAuhqrWXCuKj5n40CneAp4PVRBPlyWMKOuoS9TQ4cEPUsjZtdwoJyd38YcPJ8BajoTypVhEEf5jutDoPDXYYOK8S8bRD5riPJMuvtCJ5yAqoEBZBCCpGKlYe0ml_5I34Sylm9LwTBtPDMa2mioTMNJTkj5XNToRRaxWJXSPlOTXVGYACIzZOLzWxoSejvomYonKxaYWcwXfYVUVyiT7Po41AZvnrVOZTainkGX3f8zaul6FzgDU6SDau6ah) Today, Americans celebrate Presidents Day to honor George Washington and the standard he set as our first president. Our country has a long history of presidents who respected the power, decorum, and integrity of the office. Who listened to the American people and learned from them. Who valued facts over fiction. Who led with dignity and humility. Who were presidential. Until now. [**This Presidents Day, we’re bringing “Presidential” back. name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: They fled, I fought...
body:
No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-niiirty-ahkdjtlkr-n/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-niiirty-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,Nine years ago today, one of the most bizarre chapters in Wisconsin history was written. On February 17th, 2011, the Wisconsin Senate met in Madison to begin its work on what would eventually be known as Act 10, Wisconsin's historic union reform law. That morning, as were about to take the floor, we realized something was off: **Only half the Senate came to work that day. **That's because the 14 members of the minority Democrats decided to flee to Illinois, denying the Senate a quorum to do the job the people of Wisconsin elected us to do. Of course, that day shaped the course of our state's history in more ways than one... _**(and we all know what the end result was for Wisconsin).**_ But what better way to commemorate the anniversary than with a contribution to my campaign for Congress? [Support Fitz for Congress - $14](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-niiirty-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Support Fitz for Congress - $28](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-niiirty-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Support Fitz for Congress - $50](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-niiirty-ahkdjtlkr-t/) If you listen to the Democrats (and the protesters), they'll tell you that this chapter led directly to **Occupy Wall Street** , which led to the **99%** movement, and to **Bernie Sanders** in 2016 and today. **Well, I've been fighting socialists in Madison since long before Bernie Sanders was the frontrunner, and I know a thing or two about _winning_ those battles!**Because here are the the real results from the fight over Act 10:
* Nearly a decade of balanced budgets
* $13 billion in tax relief
* A fully-funded pension system, the strongest in the nation
* Right to Work in Wisconsin, and a 31% drop in workers choosing to belong to a union after being given a choice.

Today, I'm running for Congress to bring a taste of Wisconsin's successes to Washington, D.C.Are you with me?Thanks,Scott FitzgeraldP.S. A lot has changed in Wisconsin in the past nine years. And with your help, a lot more is going to change out in Washington, too! [Click here to join us with a gift of $14, $28, or even $50](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-niiirty-ahkdjtlkr-i/)! Thanks - Fitz

• Receive Campaign Updates

• Invite Your Friends
## **Support President Trump**
• Scott Fitzgerald was one of the earliest and most loyal Trump supporters in Wisconsin.
• President Trump needs allies like Scott Fitzgerald in Washington.

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 2/17
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Happy Monday!

Last week was a great week on the campaign trail. I have been criss-crossing the state from East Tennessee to West Tennessee. I started off the week in Knoxville and ended in Clarksville, making stops along the way in Blount County and Shelby County. This week, I will be in all Three Grand Divisions yet again! I will be headed out to Columbia to start the week before making my way out to Memphis. Thursday evening I will be attending the Tipton County Reagan Day Dinner. Saturday I will be visiting Sullivan, Johnson, Carter, and Greene Counties, before ending the busy week at the Hamblen County Lincoln Day Dinner. I'm excited about a productive week traveling our great state! Finally, I need your help! I have been traveling around Tennessee getting supporters to sign my petition to be on the ballot for U.S. Senate. I am running as the conservative outsider representing Tennessee values in Washington D.C. Sign your name and get me on the ballot in August! name: Latinos for Trump
subject: Help Latinos for Trump FIGHT socialism!
body:
Hispanic Voters Are The Key! Dear Fellow Conservative, If you’re not worried about the 2020 presidential election, you should be... If we lose a sing
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=216777.1659.1.1161e5e9fb16af7ebea4403fa5e12b4e) |
---
## Hispanic Voters Are The Key!
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, If you’re not worried about the 2020 presidential election, you should be... If we lose a single battleground state that we won in 2016, then we can say goodbye to the White House. And the Democrats know it. That’s why the Democrats have employed the failed governor candidate, Democrat and socialist Andrew Gillum to recruit one million “disenfranchised Hispanic” voters to turn Florida blue – forever. To make matters worse, the most recent polls have both Texas and Florida voting for the Democrats in 2020. So if you don’t want to see our country turn into another socialist hellhole like Venezuela, and you don’t want to give up your guns, lose your Constitutional rights, or see an open, lawless border, you need to help us stop the Democrats today. The time to take our country back is today, because if we wait until tomorrow, it may be too late – and I hope that isn’t a risk you want to take. When we reach out through the tight-knit Latino communities and share the truth about the Democrats, they share the information to their children and families, at the workplace, and even at church. Before we started employing the Democrat’s strategies against them, certain Hispanic districts were guaranteed to vote blue, every single election season, it wasn’t even close. Republicans wouldn’t even bother visiting these districts because they already considered them lost. When we endorsed Fred Rangel in the district Hillary carried by 70%, our work narrowed the margin from 70% to 16%, and today it would be even higher. When Jaimy Blanco ran for city council in Pasadena, TX, a Democrat district since the 1980’s, we cut the margin so far that we only lost by 29 mail in votes that came in LATE! Hispanic voters are going to be the key element in the 2020 race. But until now, the Republican Party has all but ignored these voters. Latino Americans share the same conservative values that you and I do. It’s time we get them on board and take them back from the Democrats and their divisive lies. Our President and our country’s future depend on it. Please do not wait. The Democrats have been infiltrating Hispanic communities for years, and many would-be Hispanic voters don’t even know that there is another option. If we’re going to take our country back, we have to do it right now.
---
## Our only hope is to get out and engage our Hispanic Americans at the very foundations of their tight-knit communities.
---
**Will you take a stand for your country today to keep the United States from falling alongside every other failed socialist disaster?** **Please consider donating TODAY to help us meet our engagement and outreach goals!** **$35 can help our volunteers reach thousands of unregistered Hispanic voters and register the to vote.** **A larger gift of $50 can help us target these hotspots of unregistered voters with carefully tailored radio advertisements on Hispanic radio channels.** **$100 can help us reach deeper into the Hispanic community and ensure a conservative future for generations.**
---
| | [ DONATE NOW TO SAVE AMERICA ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=216777.1660.1.f0936b4156f4125b37df9f3132e3e353)
---
You can also visit our store to BUY your Latinos for Trump gear and be ready to represent at a rally or in YOUR neighborhood!
---
| | [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=216777.1661.1.1738971b512457755259f944b0e769c6)
---

---

subject: Early Voting Starts Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15137719/159507465/-1907457918?refcode=02142020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjEwNTBlOC01ZjUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t88Uwm66GOEd8m_dCjWP9ID_qkhH3LTRAJANb5b3FHc=)
---
Dear Friend, This morning, I caught myself looking past the primary to the general election. I drafted an email that, after I reviewed it, snapped me out of my reverie. Looking ahead is bound to happen every once in a while. But on this first day of early voting it's imperative that we focus on the next two weeks. I'll keep that email I wrote earlier in the drafts folder for now. Hopefully I'll get to tidy it up and send it off in a couple of weeks. The short-term goal is still to do everything we can to wake up the morning of March 4th with 50% plus one vote so we can _then_ turn our attention to the general election. The average value of contributions in February is down a bit, but we're making up for that in sheer numbers. If we stay on pace, we'll have our best month ever and we'll have the resources we need not only to achieve the short-term goal, but also to lay the foundation for what comes after. There I go again, looking ahead. But you have to plan for success. So **[please chip in any amount and help us reach as many voters as possible in the coming weeks!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15137721/159507466/-1907457918?refcode=02102020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjEwNTBlOC01ZjUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t88Uwm66GOEd8m_dCjWP9ID_qkhH3LTRAJANb5b3FHc=) ** And get out there and vote! | [$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15137723/159507468/1282640063?refcode=02102020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjEwNTBlOC01ZjUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t88Uwm66GOEd8m_dCjWP9ID_qkhH3LTRAJANb5b3FHc=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15137725/159507471/1282640063?refcode=02102020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjEwNTBlOC01ZjUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t88Uwm66GOEd8m_dCjWP9ID_qkhH3LTRAJANb5b3FHc=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15137727/159507473/1282640063?refcode=02102020_em_fr_tk_b1_all&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjEwNTBlOC01ZjUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t88Uwm66GOEd8m_dCjWP9ID_qkhH3LTRAJANb5b3FHc=)

The average value of contributions in February is down a bit, but we're making up for that in sheer numbers. If we stay on pace, we'll have our best month ever and we'll have the resources we need not only to achieve the short-term goal, but also to lay the foundation for what comes after. There I go again, looking ahead. But you have to plan for success. So = And get out there and vote! | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Charles Booker for Kentucky
subject: We could be outspent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
The candidate who spends the most usually wins. That's why these emails are so important.
#
We wish it weren’t so. But the candidate who _spends the most_ usually _wins_. In 2018, nearly nine-in-ten congressional winners outspent their opponents.
So there are two numbers to watch in the Kentucky Senate race:
1. **37%** \-- the percentage of Kentuckians who approve of Mitch McConnell.
2. **$11.5 million** \-- the amount of campaign cash in Mitch McConnell’s bank.

Mitch McConnell is deeply unpopular in Kentucky. We can win! But to do so, we’ll need the resources to get our name and message out there.
The truth is, we will be heavily outspent if we don’t see a huge uptick in grassroots donations. That’s why the emails we send you are so important.
[**Make a $5 contribution right now to prevent us from getting severely outspent in our race to topple Mitch McConnell. Every contribution matters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15141803/159544110/-561360946?refcode=em20200218&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGJmODRlYS02YjUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ekG5oCQIDekC1zMRY5OutAkHf3xcDkrHF2Ig-e36X8=)
When we look back on these early days of the campaign, we don’t want to have any regrets. We don’t want to think, “With a little bit more money, we could have won.” What we raise right now will have a big impact on the number of voters who hear our message.
Thanks for sending some help,
Team Booker

name: Sandy Smith
subject: It is time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gE4ohaIxGZNxmng&b=o2cPYILnNt9M49hrMs3f1g)
---
Dear Peter,
I am Sandy Smith, Republican candidate for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

I am a patriot! I was an original supporter of President Trump in 2015.

**Unlike the Republican establishment, I stuck with the President- through all of the media’s attempts to discredit him. **

_I am proud of what President Trump has done!_ I am a true warrior for the President and his MAGA agenda.

If you are proud of our President, as I am, [I need YOUR help urgently](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gE4ohaIxGZNxmng&b=o2cPYILnNt9M49hrMs3f1g) to defeat my Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat!

Consider what President Trump has accomplished, in three short years, despite the treachery of the Swamp and the Democrats:

_-Record low unemployment. _

_-Record low Black and Hispanic unemployment. _

_-Record low female unemployment._

_-Dozens of conservative judges, remaking our Federal judiciary._

_-New, better trade agreements with Canada, Mexico, China, and other countries. _

_-Tax reforms and deregulation, paving the way for sustainable economic growth well into the future. _

_-Key terrorist leaders like al-Baghdadi and al-Soleimani killed!_

The fact is, with 65% of Americans better off today than four years ago, President Trump has done an amazing job. _**And he WILL win re-election, no matter what the Swamp says!**_

That’s why I’m running. President Trump has accomplished all of this with constant pushback from the Swamp. Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!

First, the Never-Trumper Republican establishment - Mitt Romney and Paul Ryan, the “Surrender Caucus”- fought against the President’s attempts to get government out of our Health Care.

Then, Nancy Pelosi and the revenge-driven Democrats started pushing for open borders and higher taxes, a page right out of the Soviet Union!

Now, AOC and Bernie Sanders are trying to bring Cuba’s or Venezuela’s “corrupt Communism” to America.

I’m old enough to remember a time when Americans fought Communism, when Ronald Reagan won the Cold War over the Soviet Union, when America was the “Land of the Free”.

Now, the corrupt Republicans are mostly gone, and the Democrats are flat-out embracing Marxism.

Can you believe this?!? I can’t! That’s why [I’m asking for your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gE4ohaIxGZNxmng&b=o2cPYILnNt9M49hrMs3f1g) most urgently!

That’s why it is so crucial that we take advantage of every chance we have to flip a swing district - **which North Carolina’s First District now is**!

The Congressman whose district I was redrawn into, Democrat G.K. Butterfield, is a general in Nancy Pelosi’s Congressional Socialist army. He is one of her deputy whips.

As one of Pelosi’s enforcers, G.K. Butterfield has been responsible for some of the worst embarrassments of the do-nothing Democrat Congress over the last two years:

_-G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. He voted for impeachment, not for any crime, but for political differences. _

_-He supports gun confiscation, socialized medicine, and abortion on demand up until birth. He actually voted for all of these!_

_-Butterfield voted for open borders. He doesn’t want a wall, and wants to let criminal illegal aliens stay here indefinitely - and let them vote!_

_-He wants ICE abolished and hates our brave law enforcement officers!_

_\- G.K. Butterfield votes nearly 100% of the time with Nancy Pelosi. I will vote nearly 0% of the time with Nancy Pelosi!_

This is no future for America. This voting record does not merit re-election in a swing district.

I have a different vision for America! I will always defend our Constitution, support President Trump, and fight for the values I hold dear - God, life, family, our rights and our liberties.

I owe it to our citizens to do what is best for the country. And that means running in North Carolina's 1st Congressional District against Democrat G. K. Butterfield.

G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. He supports gun confiscation, socialism, abortion on demand up until birth, and open borders.

Why is Butterfield so extreme? _Before this year, he has never had a credible challenger!_

Before the court-ordered redistricting, North Carolina’s First District was a D+36 district. It contained Durham, among other Dem strongholds.

That means that no credible Republicans ever challenged him.

_It means that the local media never challenged him. _

He is fat and happy, and doesn’t know HOW to fight. He never had to learn!

But this year, this district turned into a D+2 district. Half of the district has never been represented by Butterfield. _They don’t know him- and they are Republicans!_

These are my neighbors. They won’t accept a liberal extremist like Butterfield. They are excited to come out and vote for President Trump and for me- because I will support the MAGA agenda in Congress!

_Will you help me beat Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?_

The Dems have used the courts to cheat and choose their own voters to get rid of good Republicans the last few years. They took advantage of their new opportunities- that’s how you take Congress.

Here, we have a unique opportunity. A D+36 district got changed into a D+2 district overnight. **That means it’s a swing district** \- and a good Republican with working class appeal can flip this district!

You already know where I stand and that I will deliver on every important vote.... always! I won't waiver!

__I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi!__ She and her insane leftist agenda can go to Hell!

**I am pro-America**. Democrats like AOC and Butterfield are anti-America. We will defeat them together- but only with your help!

Butterfield has half a million dollars of dirty Swamp money. But I have already raised $500,000 myself- and [with your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gE4ohaIxGZNxmng&b=o2cPYILnNt9M49hrMs3f1g), I will have the resources to beat him!

Pelosi takes her leftists wherever she can find them. It's time to fight back - together! [Can you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gE4ohaIxGZNxmng&b=o2cPYILnNt9M49hrMs3f1g)

I need your help urgently to make sure Butterfield doesn’t bury me early. I need the resources to define him, inform voters- and win this crucial race!

We only need 18 seats to retake Congress. Can you picture what Congress would look like without Nancy Pelosi?

Think about it:

_-No impeachment.
-No tax hikes.
-No socialized medicine.
-No stifling regulations.
-No gun confiscations.
-No infanticide. _

To me, THAT’S a future we can agree on! **That’s keeping America great. **

That’s a Congress that will produce for us, instead of embarrassing us.

We need to stop impeachment and any Congressman who voted for it. [Let's save our country!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gE4ohaIxGZNxmng&b=o2cPYILnNt9M49hrMs3f1g)

I know there’s a lot of needs. Because of Pelosi’s extremism, there’s a lot of seats we can flip.

But taking out one of Pelosi’s leading generals would be a major, crippling blow to the American Left.

Without Butterfield, Pelosi will be without a right hand.

We can strike a crucial blow to the Dems by taking this seat back. Pelosi will never recover- which is OK by me!

[Your contribution will make a BIG difference here](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gE4ohaIxGZNxmng&b=o2cPYILnNt9M49hrMs3f1g). Let’s go beat the Democrats together- with YOUR help!

Keep America Great!

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, I am Sandy Smith, Republican candidate for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a patriot! I was an original supporter of President Trump in 2015. Unlike the Republican establishment, I stuck with the President- through all of the media’s attempts to discredit him. I am proud of what President Trump has done! I am a true warrior for the President and his MAGA agenda. If you are proud of our President, as I am, to defeat my Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat! Consider what President Trump has accomplished, in three short years, despite the treachery of the Swamp and the Democrats: -Record low unemployment. -Record low Black and Hispanic unemployment. -Record low female unemployment. -Dozens of conservative judges, remaking our Federal judiciary. -New, better trade agreements with Canada, Mexico, China, and other countries. -Tax reforms and deregulation, paving the way for sustainable economic growth well into the future. -Key terrorist leaders like al-Baghdadi and al-Soleimani killed! The fact is, with 65% of Americans better off today than four years ago, President Trump has done an amazing job. And he WILL win re-election, no matter what the Swamp says! That’s why I’m running. President Trump has accomplished all of this with constant pushback from the Swamp. Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress! First, the Never-Trumper Republican establishment - Mitt Romney and Paul Ryan, the “Surrender Caucus”- fought against the President’s attempts to get government out of our Health Care. Then, Nancy Pelosi and the revenge-driven Democrats started pushing for open borders and higher taxes, a page right out of the Soviet Union! Now, AOC and Bernie Sanders are trying to bring Cuba’s or Venezuela’s “corrupt Communism” to America. I’m old enough to remember a time when Americans fought Communism, when Ronald Reagan won the Cold War over the Soviet Union, when America was the “Land of the Free”. Now, the corrupt Republicans are mostly gone, and the Democrats are flat-out embracing Marxism. Can you believe this?!? I can’t! That’s why most urgently! That’s why it is so crucial that we take advantage of every chance we have to flip a swing district - which North Carolina’s First District now is! The Congressman whose district I was redrawn into, Democrat G.K. Butterfield, is a general in Nancy Pelosi’s Congressional Socialist army. He is one of her deputy whips. As one of Pelosi’s enforcers, G.K. Butterfield has been responsible for some of the worst embarrassments of the do-nothing Democrat Congress over the last two years: -G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. He voted for impeachment, not for any crime, but for political differences. -He supports gun confiscation, socialized medicine, and abortion on demand up until birth. He actually voted for all of these! -Butterfield voted for open borders. He doesn’t want a wall, and wants to let criminal illegal aliens stay here indefinitely - and let them vote! -He wants ICE abolished and hates our brave law enforcement officers! \- G.K. Butterfield votes nearly 100% of the time with Nancy Pelosi. I will vote nearly 0% of the time with Nancy Pelosi! This is no future for America. This voting record does not merit re-election in a swing district. I have a different vision for America! I will always defend our Constitution, support President Trump, and fight for the values I hold dear - God, life, family, our rights and our liberties. I owe it to our citizens to do what is best for the country. And that means running in North Carolina's 1st Congressional District against Democrat G. K. Butterfield. G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. He supports gun confiscation, socialism, abortion on demand up until birth, and open borders. Why is Butterfield so extreme? Before this year, he has never had a credible challenger! Before the court-ordered redistricting, North Carolina’s First District was a D+36 district. It contained Durham, among other Dem strongholds. That means that no credible Republicans ever challenged him. It means that the local media never challenged him. He is fat and happy, and doesn’t know HOW to fight. He never had to learn! But this year, this district turned into a D+2 district. Half of the district has never been represented by Butterfield. They don’t know him- and they are Republicans! These are my neighbors. They won’t accept a liberal extremist like Butterfield. They are excited to come out and vote for President Trump and for me- because I will support the MAGA agenda in Congress! Will you help me beat Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote? The Dems have used the courts to cheat and choose their own voters to get rid of good Republicans the last few years. They took advantage of their new opportunities- that’s how you take Congress. Here, we have a unique opportunity. A D+36 district got changed into a D+2 district overnight. That means it’s a swing district \- and a good Republican with working class appeal can flip this district! You already know where I stand and that I will deliver on every important vote.... always! I won't waiver! I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi! She and her insane leftist agenda can go to Hell! I am pro-America. Democrats like AOC and Butterfield are anti-America. We will defeat them together- but only with your help! Butterfield has half a million dollars of dirty Swamp money. But I have already raised $500,000 myself- and , I will have the resources to beat him! Pelosi takes her leftists wherever she can find them. It's time to fight back - together! I need your help urgently to make sure Butterfield doesn’t bury me early. I need the resources to define him, inform voters- and win this crucial race! We only need 18 seats to retake Congress. Can you picture what Congress would look like without Nancy Pelosi? Think about it: -No impeachment. -No tax hikes. -No socialized medicine. -No stifling regulations. -No gun confiscations. -No infanticide. To me, THAT’S a future we can agree on! That’s keeping America great. That’s a Congress that will produce for us, instead of embarrassing us. We need to stop impeachment and any Congressman who voted for it. Can you help me take this swing district back, of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000, or even $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? Can you of our Constitution and our President, with the largest contribution you can make? Anything you can give is much appreciated! I know there’s a lot of needs. Because of Pelosi’s extremism, there’s a lot of seats we can flip. But taking out one of Pelosi’s leading generals would be a major, crippling blow to the American Left. Without Butterfield, Pelosi will be without a right hand. We can strike a crucial blow to the Dems by taking this seat back. Pelosi will never recover- which is OK by me! . Let’s go beat the Democrats together- with YOUR help! Keep America Great! beat Butterfield? Taking our country back starts right here. As always, . body:
https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=4dee5b2ee8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-4dee5b2ee8-32267927

Good Morning Peter,

It’s now time to vote! This election, make a plan to vote by finding your closest early voting location, and making sure that you bring the necessary forms of ID with you.

What do I need to bring?

You’ll need one of seven types of valid photo ID to vote in Texas:
* A state driver’s license issued by the Texas Department of Public Safety
* A Texas election identification certificate (issued by DPS)
* A Texas personal identification card (issued by DPS)
* A Texas license to carry a handgun (issued by DPS)
* A U.S. military ID card with a personal photo
* A U.S. citizenship certificate with a personal photo
* A U.S. passport

Find my polling location (https://www.harrisvotes.com/EarlyVoting?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=4dee5b2ee8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-4dee5b2ee8-32267927)
See you at the polls,
Marc

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f056edfd43c5/dont-do-it-for-me-do-it-for-your-family?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Hi ,

Your very way of life is at stake in this election. After the 2020 election, you and your family will either be living with the freedoms our constitution guarantees, or you’ll be living in a socialist regime led by the progressive Democrats.

**We cannot let this happen!**

Early voting starts**TODAY** and your vote will be part of saving our country!

I need you to get out and vote for me. I’ve been working in the trenches with you and grassroots activists for years. Now, I’m needing YOU to send me to Washington D.C. as your next Congressman from Congressional District 22. I will stand with President Trump and preserve Western Civilization.

But, don’t vote for me for my sake. Send me to Washington D.C. for your family’s sake.
---
| [Yes! I will vote early!](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=41746bd2e6&e=01c99b7fbd "Yes! I will vote early!")
---
| From open borders, to destroying our economy, to promoting abortion, the backwards policies of the Democrats cannot win the day. **Vote for me to preserve YOUR conservative values.**

President Trump needs a House of Representatives that will stand with him to build the wall, secure our borders, and continue to boost our economy through the creation of jobs. The sham impeachment was a waste of time and we must **flip the House in order to help President Trump pass his agenda.**

If you vote during early voting, **TODAY** **through February 28** , you can vote at any one of the [**voting locations listed here on my website.**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=d4c458e52e&e=01c99b7fbd)

Post on your social media and let your friends and family know you’re voting to #KeepAmericaGreat and send me to Washington D.C. to fight for you and your family!

God bless America. God bless Texas. God bless you.

Kathaleen Wall
---
|
---

Hi Friend, In my small town, my teachers were heroes, and my dream was to be one of them. So I studied to be a teacher in college, completing all the requirements and classroom hours. I learned how to hold my own, connect with all kinds of kids, and manage the workload. I was mentored by educators serving children with special needs, and I advocated for my students in mental health emergencies. I answered questions about homework after school, planned my lessons, kept track of the kids who were experiencing homelessness, and graded papers late into the night. There is no work I know of that is more honest, or more important - in the lives of children, and for our country. That is why I am running for Congress to champion an excellent public education as the right of every child, regardless of zip code, skin color, gender or immigration status - and why I take a stand for teachers. I'm running to fight for:
* A ban on private, for-profit charter schools.
* Equity in school funding.
* Expanding multi-cultural curricula and affirming anti-racist values in our schools.
* Backing away from endless high-stakes testing and trusting teachers to serve their students.
* Ensuring every child has adequate recess time to move and play, and
* Starting teacher salaraies nationwide at $60k.

If you share my vision, make a contribution now to power my campaign:

It's time to take a stand against austerity, over-testing, privatization, and undervaluing educators and children. With so much at stake for our kids and their future, we can't wait. [Donate $10, $20, $100 or whatever you can afford to help power this campaign for Congress in 2020. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DAE/ni0YAA/t.2zd/YnloUtWWSDK2UO4QJgRGgw/h7/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v0vrJahIyA77Rwf2sM6fURzsfbdn4KHYGGguxqA-2Bw4NvQhspUtwXC2QxFY2Sr-2F40Ug3-2BnBC8anFBI8B3raioMOmHzNpOyusDeXynNdnQcbM9isqqOXg210mK8hJJrmkF6D8KQb2lrAOaTlmyqyHDuKMQuByuNBeX-2BA0c5i6OQyyhffGXSMqenk14hGwO0FmDnphD0jFYFKb5QcyQah0Ydfty3l94QQi-2F6fxXtMxdzwyjs-3D/7OeB) Before I could land a job teaching, I was recruited by an environmental group to work as a community organizer...The rest, as they say, is history. But my experiences and studies in education have stuck with me for a lifetime. Teachers are absolutely still my heroes. Onward, Doyle Canning

Friend, **** **** **** Next week begins one of the most crucial phases of the campaign: petitioning. Our team will be working overtime to make sure we have enough signatures to get on the ballot, plus a couple thousand more to show the strength of our grassroots movement.
With petitioning taking up a ton of our time, we can’t afford to let our fundraising fall behind. We still need to make sure that after petitioning is over we have the resources to keep up our momentum. **_[Can you make a donation today to make sure Mondaire can totally dedicate himself the next couple of weeks to getting on the ballot?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_wA/ni0YAA/t.2zd/A1ZY6PtOT5-hWuJ6oTGZJA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNI1l0o3rFdF8DguS5dA2UxJGIiN6T8CAjWz0fl26BOL3v3BrtASZGbmhj5yKTgK7H0vnVU0bmLcD9WInxZI1Z6SvrjzkfD7DbWu3MG2xcWsRfVDmuv5HsGYPR4xNOgmrfB02wR0ckqjopUFfgAsZ9afYN0G9AZvAgV1pQ78dRWp6bh1fJfE2ddPZjvLq8gr1l0MudZmj6trcBJfKNYn7sgfDGIX3HkssmeNI3M5md0dyQ-3D-3D/kwy7)_**
This is crunch time. clean_body: Next week begins one of the most crucial phases of the campaign: petitioning. Our team will be working overtime to make sure we have enough signatures to get on the ballot, plus a couple thousand more to show the strength of our grassroots movement. | | | Friend, ** Next week begins one of the most crucial phases of the campaign: petitioning. Our team will be working overtime to make sure we have enough signatures to get on the ballot, plus a couple thousand more to show the strength of our grassroots movement. With petitioning taking up a ton of our time, we can’t afford to let our fundraising fall behind. We still need to make sure that after petitioning is over we have the resources to keep up our momentum. This is crunch time. Petitioning is one of our best opportunities to demonstrate how much support our campaign has across the district. ** Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

name: Mike Bloomberg
subject: We qualified for tomorrow's DNC debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
This is because you believe in what we're building.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=995be7e663b547febe24310252c4affc&_e=BCVioSpk_doGcgmZ3lnrNH6zny4jz2SliGEZjk9sn_lFGqzDM2QlUsMr6v1Bhsw_mXV1wzsHccaJxWlO6dqB8r4ZEdZ8W_V4tnKPFXvm82wSR1DppdwadDAa3UqtSE1mCQ0oyICncSU1O7-HDpw30FioTWASpv0YxDiShkrqFjic3jilzLPjyyaMBfeLgBQlsXthuZ1-7kWA2xcSqqRwjMkobV24Pevipp7tvwu9sPJTmG4qBszzbm7V165DyMmj5Q3WGs3QuPn37VRiCnNUgA%3D%3D) Huge news, friend -- The polls are in and I officially qualified for this week’s Democratic debate. Since launching this campaign just 13 weeks ago, I’ve been traveling the country and meeting voters -- supporters like you who believe in our vision for a better America. People who are ready to fight to restore integrity in our country, and for the opportunity to bring this nation back together. I’m thrilled to have the chance to share our vision with even more voters tomorrow night. If you want updates from the team while I am on stage, text **DEBATE** to **80510**. With just 14 days until Super Tuesday, we are in a critical moment for our campaign -- thanks for being part of it. Mike Bloomberg
---

Donald Trump arrives TOMORROW.
Donald Trump arrives TOMORROW to bail out Kevin McCarthy and help him bulk up his fundraising:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15147787/159598109/-1555887065?refcode=MAN_EM_FR_200218_Trump2_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWE2MjM5My04MTUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xH2I6rzCpUSE_sa8KDtIfIEBL_eNYwx4uBvo0CEpUGM=)

Peter,
**
Polls have opened and people have already started early voting!**

We are expecting record turnout and that means we need to reach every voter possible. We know that direct voter contact like door knocking and phone banking are extremely effective at turning voters out to the polls. That is how we will win.

[**I am at the polls right now talking to voters and our team is getting people out to vote. Will you join our grassroots campaign and make calls to voters tomorrow?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15148002/159600107/237041118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTI2MzgyMi04MjUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqG-WZPSWzMJR6zSqwDScLZrPypp73SjBRFToxGgs0Y=&emci=49263822-8252-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=4a263822-8252-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=6233172)
[Make Calls For Mike Tomorrow at 6pm Central!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15148003/159600108/237041118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTI2MzgyMi04MjUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqG-WZPSWzMJR6zSqwDScLZrPypp73SjBRFToxGgs0Y=&emci=49263822-8252-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=4a263822-8252-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=6233172)
We have an amazing team that is working hard to turn people out the polls. We need your help to reach every voter that we can. Signing up to phone bank is a great way to get involved and make a real difference in this election.

**Thank you to everyone who has knocked doors, made a donation or helped us get out the word. We will flip this district with your help.[If you can't make calls, consider chipping in to fuel our grassroots campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15148004/159600109/203122784?refcode=em021820&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTI2MzgyMi04MjUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LqG-WZPSWzMJR6zSqwDScLZrPypp73SjBRFToxGgs0Y=)**

Fighting for you,

clean_body: Peter, Polls have opened and people have already started early voting! We are expecting record turnout and that means we need to reach every voter possible. We know that direct voter contact like door knocking and phone banking are extremely effective at turning voters out to the polls. That is how we will win. We have an amazing team that is working hard to turn people out the polls. We need your help to reach every voter that we can. Signing up to phone bank is a great way to get involved and make a real difference in this election. Thank you to everyone who has knocked doors, made a donation or helped us get out the word. We will flip this district with your help.= Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Kay C. James
subject: Membership Question
body:
| | | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010bGwFEp5idAadzTc88u455a21NMwq-P4SvxuHlRbgjIRSxJMsBERufM4VaIJ1axaBas4w0ICcyoeYrFPFCXzGJsapx059WVKu8eH4WCYTKRofZIIz9z0I3agzhdyO6ug8B_v99M7ervgtVfswjGTBTwwRksaSkul8J-W_mabQCyJntOlDqchLzAlHCcoxmpX4jMMmhyoZj1CB2qjqsiC0jsNWNTyaafuGqfXuHYhObHdqtln1AgO_Ulj00phcxB9TnyV3UBnxqMoflrgOiJP0Fvpd9A3OHN9D3W1WZa2bcz1XAciP3eRjci7vk9FpXFT3XH6KeUrg8ZS9t6uYL4B5EuCyV7bfGsU&c=Lac-vRn4I5FrYInHPd3zlceOMgNRHlD1dSBzwDgrnYZXxVEYFI2xdQ==&ch=BxcYgRTwyUILjU7JcKecPQ91ko4CPQ-PBR9kzPUBIR3oYvdw_w2Rmg==)
---
| | | Fellow Conservative, Today, I'm writing to ask you to consider becoming a part of the movement that can transform america. Free enterprise, limited government, individual freedom, traditional American values, and a strong national defense--these are the values that we fight for every single day. As the nation's largest, most broadly-supported think tank, The Heritage Foundation has long been the bastion of the American conservative movement. And with more than 500,000 members, our ranks are growing stronger every day. And now, you can join us and help to ensure that your values are being advanced in Washington, in the Media, and across this great nation. **Conservative leadership listens to Heritage.** In 1980, just as Reagan was beginning his first term in office, The Heritage Foundation developed the "Mandate for Leadership," a detailed policy manual on everything from taxes and regulation to trade and national defense. Reagan used this Mandate to help realize his vision of an America the world could admire once again. When President Trump took office just a few short years ago, The Heritage Foundation presented him with another Mandate for Leadership, focused on undoing the damage of the progressive agenda Obama forced upon the American people. And just as Reagan did, Trump adopted the Mandate as his blueprint for making limited government and conservative values a reality in our generation. Already, his administration has implemented more than two-thirds of the Mandate and moved the country closer to the conservative vision than it has been in decades. There is a lot of work left to do--and Heritage is in the best position to do it. We have been named the most influential public policy think tank in the world by the University of Pennsylvania (for two years in a row). With your help, we can wield that influence to reclaim America for generations to come. [Learn More Now >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010bGwFEp5idAadzTc88u455a21NMwq-P4SvxuHlRbgjIRSxJMsBERufM4VaIJ1axaBas4w0ICcyoeYrFPFCXzGJsapx059WVKu8eH4WCYTKRofZIIz9z0I3agzhdyO6ug8B_v99M7ervgtVfswjGTBTwwRksaSkul8J-W_mabQCyJntOlDqchLzAlHCcoxmpX4jMMmhyoZj1CB2qjqsiC0jsNWNTyaafuGqfXuHYhObHdqtln1AgO_Ulj00phcxB9TnyV3UBnxqMoflrgOiJP0Fvpd9A3OHN9D3W1WZa2bcz1XAciP3eRjci7vk9FpXFT3XH6KeUrg8ZS9t6uYL4B5EuCyV7bfGsU&c=Lac-vRn4I5FrYInHPd3zlceOMgNRHlD1dSBzwDgrnYZXxVEYFI2xdQ==&ch=BxcYgRTwyUILjU7JcKecPQ91ko4CPQ-PBR9kzPUBIR3oYvdw_w2Rmg==)
## Enough is enough--it is time to reverse our course.
The Heritage Foundation has the policy solutions that can make America that "shining city upon a hill" once again. And we are strategically positioned to do just that:
* **President Donald Trump stands with Heritage** , saying "For nearly half a century, Heritage has been titans in the fight to defend, promote, and preserve our great American Heritage."

* **Heritage employs some of the smartest minds in Washington.** With over 100 policy experts, Heritage truly has the talent to be able to solve complex policy issues, with simple and effective conservative solutions. As Rush Limbaugh has said, "Some of the finest conservative scholars alive today, live, work, and breathe at The Heritage Foundation."

* **Heritage has a media distribution network second to none.** Millions of Americans visit our Daily Signal website each year, bypassing the mainstream media filter to get the facts. Heritage experts appear on television and radio dozens of times each week, publish hundreds of sound policy research reports annually, and host hundreds of meetings a year with grassroots leaders and local and national officials.

* **Heritage is located right in the belly of the beast.** Location is everything. Heritage is the largest single land owner on Capitol Hill, with offices just 1000 steps from the House and 500 steps from the Senate. This strategic location gives us access to lawmakers and public officials that need to be equipped with policy solutions that represent your conservative principles.

[Learn More Now >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010bGwFEp5idAadzTc88u455a21NMwq-P4SvxuHlRbgjIRSxJMsBERufM4VaIJ1axaBas4w0ICcyoeYrFPFCXzGJsapx059WVKu8eH4WCYTKRofZIIz9z0I3agzhdyO6ug8B_v99M7ervgtVfswjGTBTwwRksaSkul8J-W_mabQCyJntOlDqchLzAlHCcoxmpX4jMMmhyoZj1CB2qjqsiC0jsNWNTyaafuGqfXuHYhObHdqtln1AgO_Ulj00phcxB9TnyV3UBnxqMoflrgOiJP0Fvpd9A3OHN9D3W1WZa2bcz1XAciP3eRjci7vk9FpXFT3XH6KeUrg8ZS9t6uYL4B5EuCyV7bfGsU&c=Lac-vRn4I5FrYInHPd3zlceOMgNRHlD1dSBzwDgrnYZXxVEYFI2xdQ==&ch=BxcYgRTwyUILjU7JcKecPQ91ko4CPQ-PBR9kzPUBIR3oYvdw_w2Rmg==)
## Get Exclusive Insider Access to Heritage When You Become a Member Today
When you become an official member of The Heritage Foundation, you are taking your place along with over 500,000 fellow conservatives that stand for conservative principles of free enterprise, limited government, individual liberty, traditional American values, and a strong national defense. But, as a member, you also get special access to content and benefits that are not available anywhere else: | | **Official Heritage Membership Card**
Heritage Foundation members are proud to stand for their conservative principles and we recognize each member with their own exclusive membership card.
---|---
|
| **Special Invitations to Gatherings**
As a member, you will be invited to attend special gatherings where you can meet and network with Heritage staff and fellows as well as other conservatives that share your values.
|
| **Exclusive Updates from Our President**
We want you to be constantly informed about the impact of our your membership. Every member will receive regular updates from the front lines of policy battles happening in Washington DC and across the country.
|
| **Subscription to the Morning Bell**
The Morning Bell arrives in your inbox first thing every weekday morning with the day's most important news, conservative commentary and policy analysis--in a fresh, visually rich, readable format for your desktop, tablet or phone. As a member, you will get a free subscription to the daily edition of the Morning Bell.
## Activate Your Membership to The Heritage Foundation Instantly
With your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25 or more, you will join over 500,000 Americans as an official member of The Heritage Foundation. Your membership will help to support our work to build an America where freedom, prosperity, opportunity and civil society flourish. Simply complete the form below and your membership will be instantly activated.
[Learn More Now >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010bGwFEp5idAadzTc88u455a21NMwq-P4SvxuHlRbgjIRSxJMsBERufM4VaIJ1axaBas4w0ICcyoeYrFPFCXzGJsapx059WVKu8eH4WCYTKRofZIIz9z0I3agzhdyO6ug8B_v99M7ervgtVfswjGTBTwwRksaSkul8J-W_mabQCyJntOlDqchLzAlHCcoxmpX4jMMmhyoZj1CB2qjqsiC0jsNWNTyaafuGqfXuHYhObHdqtln1AgO_Ulj00phcxB9TnyV3UBnxqMoflrgOiJP0Fvpd9A3OHN9D3W1WZa2bcz1XAciP3eRjci7vk9FpXFT3XH6KeUrg8ZS9t6uYL4B5EuCyV7bfGsU&c=Lac-vRn4I5FrYInHPd3zlceOMgNRHlD1dSBzwDgrnYZXxVEYFI2xdQ==&ch=BxcYgRTwyUILjU7JcKecPQ91ko4CPQ-PBR9kzPUBIR3oYvdw_w2Rmg==)

I hope you will consider it.
Sincerely,
Kay C. James
President, The Heritage Foundation

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010bGwFEp5idAadzTc88u455a21NMwq-P4SvxuHlRbgjIRSxJMsBERufM4VaIJ1axaBas4w0ICcyoeYrFPFCXzGJsapx059WVKu8eH4WCYTKRofZIIz9z0I3agzhdyO6ug8B_v99M7ervgtVfswjGTBTwwRksaSkul8J-W_mabQCyJntOlDqchLzAlHCcoxmpX4jMMmhyoZj1CB2qjqsiC0jsNWNTyaafuGqfXuHYhObHdqtln1AgO_Ulj00phcxB9TnyV3UBnxqMoflrgOiJP0Fvpd9A3OHN9D3W1WZa2bcz1XAciP3eRjci7vk9FpXFT3XH6KeUrg8ZS9t6uYL4B5EuCyV7bfGsU&c=Lac-vRn4I5FrYInHPd3zlceOMgNRHlD1dSBzwDgrnYZXxVEYFI2xdQ==&ch=BxcYgRTwyUILjU7JcKecPQ91ko4CPQ-PBR9kzPUBIR3oYvdw_w2Rmg==)
| | The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE | Washington, D.C. 20002

Peter -- it's a huge day!

All over Texas, folks will start voting in the Democratic primary. **Every vote for MJ is a vote for ending the status quo** and sending a proven fighter to the Senate, and we need to keep spreading that message until primary election day on March 3rd!

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Will you chip in for the first time today? $2 or whatever you can give today will help us raise the $7 million we need to power this movement and remain competitive on Super Tuesday.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Thanks to the donations we've received since Wednesday, we've been able to expand our advertising budget in Nevada. Woo-hoo! I'm spending the next several days traveling to Nevada, South Carolina... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a99f/45c30650/1ff41fef0/66e5b8f0/2728708283/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Last Wednesday, I announced our campaign's most ambitious fundraising goal yet: raising $7 million before the Nevada caucuses.

Since then, grassroots donors across the country have raised their hands and chipped in a few bucks -- many for the first time -- and together, we've made great progress. I'm so grateful to everyone who's pitched in and helped power this movement.

**Thanks to the donations we've received since Wednesday, we've been able to expand our advertising budget in Nevada. Woo-hoo!**

I'm spending the next several days traveling to Nevada, South Carolina, and Super Tuesday states, talking with as many voters as I can. But we still have some work to do to reach our goal, so I'm counting on more first-time grassroots donors to chip in so our campaign can remain competitive through Super Tuesday.

**[That's why I'm asking you: Will you chip in for the first time today? $2 or whatever you can give today will help us raise the $7 million we need to power this movement and remain competitive on Super Tuesday.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a99f/45c30650/1ff41fef0/66e5b8f2/2728708283/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzFIRl9FR0xfRVdEX0VfMjAyMDAyMThfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO1HF_EGL_EWD_E_20200218_V1S1_P")**

>
If this were another campaign, I'd be flying to Silicon Valley or Manhattan to raise money from deep-pocketed donors at closed-door events. Some of the other candidates are doing that right now.

But I'm relying on grassroots donors, and grassroots donors only -- no fancy fundraisers with the wealthy and well-connected, no billionaire fortune, just working people chipping in whatever they can, whenever they can.

That's the grassroots movement we're building together. And that's the kind of grassroots movement that will beat Donald Trump in November.

**[I can't do this without you. Will you step up for the first time and chip in $2 today to power our movement for big, structural change?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a99f/45c30650/1ff41fef0/66e5b8f2/2728708283/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzFIRl9FR0xfRVdEX0VfMjAyMDAyMThfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO1HF_EGL_EWD_E_20200218_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Marcy Kaptur for Congress
subject: You can still register friends and family to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P
body:
| | | Dear Friend, This year's election is too important to watch our friends and neighbors sit on the sidelines. **Today is our last chance to register voters for the 2020 Ohio primary on March 17th.** **It's easy to register to vote or to update your address online:[Just go to VoteOhio.gov](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CwE/ni0YAA/t.2zd/fCb4nen6S1mVcZwK2642gw/h0/Oln8o3IWX465-2BCh72KaA7uc3S3-2BcE5f5DC1Ux3bO7JdejJCfOqv26n5SD0IPTDcXYCwjkhKYLWh2L4pmrUVCLfNcbUFrMj0aytbsq-2BgZGnL1ohJWsQHocgjvFCchSKX0yeAvz-2FHSNPGNhJv2Hy5TQlUbmgxb0ZFre-2FQWJD6ndZiDhjwWLnJqp-2BZDb13kUdQJLQUiMHj3gB-2FY42uOXVFszgsRzhy7ugLabEflZ8xVq7AbSnEqIdynWvu8n4PPpKCc-2B2p4gFGL-2FzscbCpdi21piKbIDQhypjECurb-2FtLW2DJPkzP5rwwvD-2BeS8Oa8ztGUzjxZCRpj5aK27SNlrG7Bhtg-3D-3D/aeq5) and follow the directions provided.** Please consider reaching out with a phone call or text message, as well as on your social media platforms, to friends and family that might not be registered yet. Our country simply cannot afford four more years of Donald Trump. **Regardless of who we support in the Democratic primary process, we can agree that turning out voters is essential to winning in November.** That needs to start now, and I'm thankful for your help. Best wishes, Marcy
---

name: Corky Messner
subject: Dartmouth leftists have silenced me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Can you believe this assault on free speech? WHAT has happened to our colleges and universities? READ MORE >>>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/6f9a583f38813fdd/cccd97d4de5949d5c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, We’ve seen this happen all over the country for years. Now, it’s me, at Dartmouth.

**The radical-left rage mob has SHUT DOWN my planned speech before the university’s College Republicans!**

We all know that Dartmouth’s professors and a majority of students today are liberals. This goes beyond any of that...

They have shut down a former U.S. Army Ranger, a businessman who has lived the American Dream, and a Republican candidate for the United States Senate.

And why?

_All because they HATE our President, and the fact that I support his America First agenda!_

It has **Trump Derangement Syndrome** written all over it.

Help us fight back and continue to share my message.

**[Tap or click HERE to make a $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 contribution!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/6f9a583f38813fdd/b59098806e217efbc3d6b838967d376c/33153) **

The left’s hypocrisy knows no bounds.

What ever happened to the open exchange of ideas? Good faith debates? Free speech?

_This is ALL out the window on far too many campuses today!_

Students, professors, and administrators have built cultures of left-wing indoctrination, where “activists” use intimidation and ostracization to coerce students into self-censorship. They CAN’T STAND opposing viewpoints or having to defeat their ideas.

It’s been DECADES now of an all-out assault on free speech.

Our young people, and our society, deserve better from our colleges and universities. These should be places where students are free to explore and question ideas.

**Shame on these “activist” students and their implied threats. Shame on those who SHOULD be the adults in the room for caving in to them**.

clean_body: Can you believe this assault on free speech? WHAT has happened to our colleges and universities? READ MORE >>> Peter, We’ve seen this happen all over the country for years. Now, it’s me, at Dartmouth. The radical-left rage mob has SHUT DOWN my planned speech before the university’s College Republicans! We all know that Dartmouth’s professors and a majority of students today are liberals. This goes beyond any of that... They have shut down a former U.S. Army Ranger, a businessman who has lived the American Dream, and a Republican candidate for the United States Senate. And why? All because they HATE our President, and the fact that I support his America First agenda! It has Trump Derangement Syndrome written all over it. Help us fight back and continue to share my message. The left’s hypocrisy knows no bounds. What ever happened to the open exchange of ideas? Good faith debates? Free speech? This is ALL out the window on far too many campuses today! Students, professors, and administrators have built cultures of left-wing indoctrination, where “activists” use intimidation and ostracization to coerce students into self-censorship. They CAN’T STAND opposing viewpoints or having to defeat their ideas. It’s been DECADES now of an all-out assault on free speech. Our young people, and our society, deserve better from our colleges and universities. These should be places where students are free to explore and question ideas. Shame on these “activist” students and their implied threats. Shame on those who SHOULD be the adults in the room for caving in to them. Sincerely, Corky Messner Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – New Hampshire | | | ---|--- id:2020-02-11-22:32:25:548t | PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE |

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: My Subject
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Senator Tom Cotton Endorses Fellow Combat Veteran Wesley Hunt **

Houston, TX – Today, conservative Arkansas Senator Tom Cotton endorsed fellow combat veteran and conservative Republican Wesley Hunt for Congress in Texas’ 7th District. Senator Cotton was deployed to Baghdad during the same time period as Hunt in 2006.

“Wesley Hunt served his country with valor and he’ll do the same for Texas. Wesley has the courage and leadership that we need in Washington so let’s send him to Congress,” said Cotton.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=3b03d458dc7d41fc96935a6d1f2583be&_e=yyL0vxgMHI4qE2mQK2uQnDnVHFQ9cCud-gkhv0iXseU1jZL3HgHEj1OdlCRWdmyYNDI_289p7yEee2F_bdcZi6Mvdccktk3q0Na33q7wNgQ9xDn9LRDM_6oYQmYkadyaTwuJ9VyiKMENtthxrjFqFXtkxaFJ9wwXtgMczUR0wBaBVtkyHr-5i_FWw469J8cMClz4cMBfq8da5ASS1dRNJ5c2eYZGEg_sreP9rp9CvwtZ2mbcLNyZ4f0gf8sUdHcI9PhEh9Z9kz4H9hf8f5wrog%3D%3D)
[Click Here To Watch Senator Cotton's Video](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=3b03d458dc7d41fc96935a6d1f2583be&_e=yyL0vxgMHI4qE2mQK2uQnDnVHFQ9cCud-gkhv0iXseU1jZL3HgHEj1OdlCRWdmyY3br5k9PQe0tVJraYQPMnNFZl9ugpWIOrfje8cOcFIA88YcEg_KWEl1F9RUNHO3csfT2BNIknzPjQ8FWFOopZI5567ksUEqIJsJJg6jPgSVG7ev-AnVjiE6MiydmoF5Ya-WI02U9QUGkzYgZXMvKZ8ixEhbeD5wpJX4jBj-HDhZAtQFeLJzfAyGa8qid9A0_si7_NhbU3ilxz5N-JWyKu9Q%3D%3D)

“I’m honored to have the endorsement of Senator Cotton, a man who knows what it truly means to defend our freedom,” said Hunt. “When it comes to fighting to secure our border, strengthening our military and economic freedom that benefits our economy, I’ll follow the excellent example Senator Cotton has set in the Senate.”

Wesley Hunt is a Houston native, combat veteran and conservative Republican running for Congress in Texas’ 7th District to defeat liberal Congresswoman Lizzie Fletcher and defend Houston and its way of life. Cotton joins a long list of endorsers that includes President Donald J. Trump, Senator Ted Cruz, Harris County Commissioners Jack Cagle and Steve Radack, popular conservative radio host Michael Berry.
Early Voting in Harris County begins today and runs through February 28th. [To find your polling location, click here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=3b03d458dc7d41fc96935a6d1f2583be&_e=yyL0vxgMHI4qE2mQK2uQnD8ZnLiHrmjZ0g0ETJ_KbWlpm9K57_XO_CKXQACG3mnQnSb97skW6KI-o6ETAGMpNofYMDUGR_cU8kht53m7nW7u7vPLF7aXZ8HGlmozAoFr5drxmWoe6aHz8j_26OwW2bW6h2Cp4YRl72Nke6ZjjHwcZjLJqkWezuI_0JEFNDMhidx3BE5j25TRKqRJDxw3n8bSEX3MKGJp_aWQ1pMp3zue7ACt0toGhTq_Yw3SNcIXwIWOcxCqUgPJ8ZxQ_6ML1g%3D%3D).

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=3b03d458dc7d41fc96935a6d1f2583be&_e=yyL0vxgMHI4qE2mQK2uQnNqNhxRRRlPGXoTPn2cGCVPok8QvukxdV6xflFR1b8i7ZqiJCJE6V0vJf32eSGEBW8f1_d7yBDfOG1BVQ77TUCnG2-FpOLpu66rU3wOtYeEScejNq6cV9nxVNlpoWMfRKbMMHV1_XSMltLtrwKNkdsWduEtYm_8JFBk99by9A2ZG2yYLkFHj3YFoXQU0W9AZwigVwFb08bbyTS7Su9L3ND1A0LYP7ad0bRipwhXP_-JsajK2kYYQUMudEnq_1_V6l0ldavxKqh9IzoH0hh5tcRc%3D)****

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: A Season For Change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
Dear Supporter,
We are in the midst of a season of change for women! From the strength and heroism of leaders such as Shirley Chisholm and Barbara Jordan, to the courage of the Equal Rights Amendment, women continue to fight for our rights and equality.
_ _[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4yx1eLwPaoPEGTq9aHgPDCJisdRhv20sAvqvx58xB4k=/nYjEF1aTOIXv34v6TPG8m62gNcTZxHs_zTffCgq3ous=)

I am a woman seeking to become the first African American woman elected to the U.S. Senate from North Carolina, and only the third elected in the history of our nation. In an additional show of support of my candidacy, I have received yet another endorsement to add to our list of incredibly supportive endorsers, the Guilford County Community PAC.
Let's make history together for North Carolina, our nation, and the world! I am speaking with our supporters across the state and they are ENERGIZED! I am asking you to help me sustain a robust GOTV campaign with your contribution. If you can give $5, $10, $25, $50 or more, it could really make the difference between running a good race and WINNING a good race! **Please contribute today. **
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4yx1eLwPaoPEGTq9aHgPDCJisdRhv20sAvqvx58xB4k=/nYjEF1aTOIXv34v6TPG8m62gNcTZxHs_zTffCgq3ous=)

**I am One of Us for ALL of US!**
#EricaForUS

name: Emily Rybak
subject: THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! Kathy Landing for Congress Super Saturday Event
body:
Good Afternoon,

My name is Emily Rybak, and I am proud to serve as the campaign manager for Kathy Landing’s campaign for Congress.

Thank you so much for your continued support of Kathy and her campaign to win back the First Congressional District for conservatives, families, and sensible solutions. With your support, we will ensure Kathy can get to work on the issues most important to us: keeping our economy strong, securing our border and keeping our nation safe, improving our infrastructure, lowering healthcare costs with market-based solutions, and protecting our tax dollars.

While we all know Kathy is the strongest Republican candidate to win back this seat, we need to ensure all of our neighbors know this too.

That said, we would be grateful for your help to spread Kathy’s incredibly inspiring story and her conservative platform across the district. The first major opportunity to do so is this Saturday - February 22nd - with our Super Saturday door knocking event.

We will meet at 10:00AM on Saturday, February 22nd at the Chick-Fil-A at 1024 Johnnie Dodds Boulevard in Mount Pleasant. After fueling up with chicken biscuits, we will disperse in teams to knock doors in Mount Pleasant.

We will ensure all of our volunteers and dedicated supporters have all they need to make it an enjoyable and successful activity. Maps, lists, literature, and instructions will be provided; you just need to bring your tennis shoes! We will even have yard signs and bumper magnets, which just arrived!

We will knock until 1:30PM, when we will meet back at Chick-Fil-A for lunch. If your legs aren’t too tired and you would like to continue on, we will go back out after lunch.

If you have any family members or friends who would like to join our Super Saturday efforts, we would love to have them!

Please reply to this email and let us know if you are able or not to help. You can also call me at 843-333-3195.

Again and on behalf of Kathy and our entire team, thank you so much for your support of Kathy and for your willingness to volunteer for the campaign. Hope to see next Saturday!

On to Victory,

Emily Rybak
843.333.3195

\--

Emily Rybak
[emily@kathylanding.com](mailto:emily@kathylanding.com)
843-333-3195

I recently had the pleasure of spending time with Brian Fitzpatrick in Pennsylvania and let me tell you...I’m very impressed.
Friend, I recently had the pleasure of spending time with Brian Fitzpatrick in Pennsylvania and let me tell you...I’m very impressed. During his time in Congress, Brian has successfully championed legislation to improve the lives of the people of Pennsylvania’s 1st district. And he holds a seat Democrats carried for President – he’s that strong a candidate. But the Radical Left has their sights set on beating Brian destroying the progress has made for the families of Pennsylvania. clean_body: I recently had the pleasure of spending time with Brian Fitzpatrick in Pennsylvania and let me tell you...I’m very impressed. Friend, I recently had the pleasure of spending time with Brian Fitzpatrick in Pennsylvania and let me tell you...I’m very impressed. During his time in Congress, Brian has successfully championed legislation to improve the lives of the people of Pennsylvania’s 1st district. And he holds a seat Democrats carried for President – he’s that strong a candidate. But the Radical Left has their sights set on beating Brian destroying the progress has made for the families of Pennsylvania. We need YOUR support to keep Brian and his commonsense, bipartisan agenda in Congress. Brian has fought for bipartisan solutions to our nation’s toughest issues. From lowering prescription drug costs to supporting free trade agreements like USMCA that help America’s farmers and manufacturers, Brian keeps the best interests of his constituents in mind when making decisions. With your help, Brian will stand for strong, commonsense solutions to our most pressing problems and continue fighting back against the scourge of Socialism. The pathway to securing a Conservative majority in the House runs straight through Pennsylvania’s 1st district, and that starts with YOU. Thank you, Karl Rove Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress PO Box 939 Langhorne, PA 19047 This email is sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress. To unsubscribe from future emails use this \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

body:
[1]Powered By People

Texas is in the midst of a
gun violence crisis. More than 3,500 people died in firearm deaths in
2017.

Despite efforts from democrats in the state Legislature — and even though
most Texans agree that this is an urgent problem that must be fixed —
common sense measures like universal background checks are repeatedly
stonewalled.

To counter this, we put together a resource to track how our elected
officials voted on gun violence legislation in the 2019 session:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42290?t=1001&akid=79768%2E444211%2E14e3JG ]How to hold Texas legislators responsible

Please take a moment to [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42290?t=1002&akid=79768%2E444211%2E14e3JG ]read Beto’s Medium post detailing this new
resource and the severity of this gun violence epidemic.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42291?refcode=ema20200218-79768&t=1021&akid=79768%2E444211%2E14e3JG ]And when you’re done, consider making a $3 contribution to Powered By
People, so we can continue doing the important work of electing
legislators who have the guts to do what’s right.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42291?refcode=ema20200218-79768&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=79768%2E444211%2E14e3JG ]Donate

Given the level of gun violence in this country, it’s critical that we
hold our elected representatives accountable for what they’ve done or
failed to do when it comes to gun safety legislation.

And if we are unable to hold them accountable in office, it’s time to
replace them with public servants who will do what’s right.

Thank you for being with us,

Powered By People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42291?refcode=ema20200218-79768&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=79768%2E444211%2E14e3JG ]Donate
