name: =?utf-8?Q?Quinn=20Kobrin=2C=20Marc=20Flores=20for=20Congress?=
subject: I have a request...
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZN2XmslKalQ&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=fe215bcdee-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_18_02_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-fe215bcdee-32267927
Communications Director Quinn Kobrin on early voting.
Good morning Peter,
As many of you know, I have been working on Marc's campaign since last summer. In the time I've known Marc, I have seen what a great leader he is, and how much he cares about helping others.

Before he left his job to run for Congress, before he was invested in politics, Marc was a volunteer in the community, helping out with organizations like US Vets, and was driven by the motivation to do good for others.

Marc has taught me a lot since I've joined this campaign, but one of my biggest takeaways by far is that there is never an issue too small, nor a concern so complex, that it need not be addressed. Even if it can't be solved at the Federal level, Marc has always said that he is committed to working with every level of government to make sure the issues of his constituents will be addressed.
MY REQUEST
If you watched the video above, you know that today is my birthday! That being said, I humbly request that you take my words to heart, remember to vote today, and vote for Marc. District 18 is in need of new vision and strong leadership, and I believe Marc is the person for the job.

Please be sure to donate (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=fe215bcdee-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_18_02_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-fe215bcdee-32267927) if you are able. We have been and will continue to devote every dime, every second, every ounce of energy we have towards sharing Marc's message with the voters. Whatever you can give will help us in these efforts, and increase our odds that much more.
VOLUNTEER
We will are going to need a lot of help working the polls the next couple of days. If you or someone you know have a few hours to spare between now and March 3rd, please reply to this email, and I will set you up with a time and a place to speak on Marc's behalf.

**

Express Donate: $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=fe215bcdee-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_18_02_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-fe215bcdee-32267927)

Express Donate: $50 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=fe215bcdee-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_18_02_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-fe215bcdee-32267927)

Express Donate: $100 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=fe215bcdee-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_18_02_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-fe215bcdee-32267927)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=fe215bcdee-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_18_02_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-fe215bcdee-32267927)

------------------------------------------------------------
Thank you very much for all that you've done for us thus far. This campaign has never been about beating someone, or running against them. This has always been about running for the people of the district -- speaking out for the voiceless, standing up for the defenseless, and advocating for the helpless. We would not be here without all of your support and dedication.

Thanks, and see you at the polls!

Quinn Kobrin
Communications Director
Marc Flores for Congress

============================================================

clean_body: Communications Director Quinn Kobrin on early voting. Good morning Peter, As many of you know, I have been working on Marc's campaign since last summer. In the time I've known Marc, I have seen what a great leader he is, and how much he cares about helping others. Before he left his job to run for Congress, before he was invested in politics, Marc was a volunteer in the community, helping out with organizations like US Vets, and was driven by the motivation to do good for others. Marc has taught me a lot since I've joined this campaign, but one of my biggest takeaways by far is that there is never an issue too small, nor a concern so complex, that it need not be addressed. Even if it can't be solved at the Federal level, Marc has always said that he is committed to working with every level of government to make sure the issues of his constituents will be addressed. subject: Trump is coming to Colorado this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Here comes Trump. The president is coming to Colorado this week to reward our opponent, Cory Gardner, for blocking witnesses during Trump's trial and voting to acquit him this month. And we just learned that Trump is also hosting a lavish fundraiser for Gardner, too -- where corporate donors can pay or raise up to $25,000 just to get a photo with them. Can you believe that? **Trump is going to raise A LOT of money for Gardner this week, and we need every available resource to fight back.** So, we're setting an ambitious goal of raising $250,000 online from grassroots donors like yourself. And we're asking: **Can you make a contribution of $10 or more to help us fight back against Donald Trump and Cory Gardner and everything they plan to throw at our team this week? | A Message from Matt!
---
Welcome to the very first Mayberry for Congress Campaign Newsletter! It's been less than a month since I announced my campaign to unseat Chris Pappas and the response from all of you has been tremendous. In fact, we have already released 102 public endorsements from local and state elected officials and party activists! We want to make sure that all of you are up-to-date on what the campaign has been up to, events that we are participating in and ways that you can help us spread our message. Please stay tuned for future newsletters, and most of all, thank you for your support! \- Matt

name: Team Eugene
subject: URGENT PETITION: Trump is gutting Social Security & Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
The president just announced his budget and it slashes funding to critical programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15155150/159674455/-471840464?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTZkZjY3Yy1hMTUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iXzq_N_EIFmLh_dL-H2mVZc0bhlU4vFpPjrcKKINsOI=&emci=cdfa8868-9b52-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=216df67c-a152-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249) Team, we need you to see this now.

**The president just announced his budget and it slashes funding to critical programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.**

In doing this, the White House is asking America’s seniors and working folks to foot the bill for the massive tax cuts they passed for big corporations and the wealthiest among us. **Team, this is unacceptable.**

[**Will you sign our petition calling on Congress to protect Social Security and Medicare?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15155151/159674456/-471840464?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTZkZjY3Yy1hMTUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iXzq_N_EIFmLh_dL-H2mVZc0bhlU4vFpPjrcKKINsOI=&emci=cdfa8868-9b52-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=216df67c-a152-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249) | [Protect these programs »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15155152/159674457/-471840464?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTZkZjY3Yy1hMTUyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iXzq_N_EIFmLh_dL-H2mVZc0bhlU4vFpPjrcKKINsOI=&emci=cdfa8868-9b52-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=216df67c-a152-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249)

These cuts will impact millions of people across the country, and disproportionately impact the most vulnerable among us. **Pennsylvanians deserve better, team.** In Congress, Eugene will fight any cut to these crucial programs.

name: Progressive Majority
subject: POLITICO: Biden surrogate warns of "'down-ballot carnage' if Bernie Sanders marches to the nomination"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Majority PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter \-- After losing to Sanders in Iowa and New Hampshire, Joe Biden's campaign co-chair Rep. Cedric Richmond warned, "If Bernie Sanders was at the top of the ticket, we would be in jeopardy of losing the House. We would not get the Senate back." It's absolutely critical that Democrats commit to turning out to vote regardless of who is at the top of the ticket. According to a recent Emerson poll, 28% of Democrats are saying they might not vote in November, depending on who becomes the nominee. Nearly a third of Democrats staying home in November would guarantee we lose the House and leave the Senate in Mitch McConnell's hands. We need to know where you stand: | | **Will you vote against Donald Trump?**
[ Yes

name: Tim Ryan
subject: An update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Fighting what matters to our district | | Team, I grew up in our district and I still live here. In my career, I've had the chance to visit cities and towns across America, but between you and me, I still prefer our corner of Northeast Ohio. That's why, after so many years, I'm still fighting for the things that make our community special. I wanted to give you an update on the most important issues facing our community right now:
1. **Trump recently announced he would break a central campaign promise and slash Social Security and Medicare benefits if re-elected.** Social Security has lifted millions of older Ohioans out of poverty -- that's why I believe this vital program should be expanded, not cut.
**I 'm a proud cosponsor of the Social Security 2100 Act**, which would expand benefits for all current and future Social Security recipients, while cutting taxes for over 10 million seniors and fully funding the program through the end of the century.
2. **I'm leading the effort to secure a $200 million Advanced Technology Vehicles Manufacturing loan for Lordstown Motors** , which will help update the former GM Lordstown Assembly Plant, manufacture electric pickup trucks and create hundreds of good-paying jobs.
It's not enough to bring jobs back to our communities -- we need to build an economy that works for all of us. **I 'm cosponsoring the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act**, which protects workers from exploitation, punishes employers who break the law, and grants hundreds of thousands of workers more collective bargaining power. We passed it in the House. And my **WORKER Act** , which fights the effects of automation, reinvests in our communities, and trains American workers for the jobs of the future, was just introduced in the Senate.

Your support helps me continue to fight for the issues that matter to our community. **[Can you pitch in today to keep me in the fight?](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb2/5486deaa/3e220d10/dcb9f21/2300339758/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200202_district_update&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+pitch+in+today+to+keep+me+in+the&utm_campaign=200202_district_update&source=200202_district_update")** Thanks for all you do, \-- Tim **[Contribute](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb2/5486deaa/3e220d10/dcb9f20/2300339758/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200202_district_update_button&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Contribute&utm_campaign=200202_district_update&source=200202_district_update")** ** ** ** **

* * *
---
| |
#
Meet Tim Ryan
---
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| | **Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446

The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb2/5486deaa/3e220d10/dcb9f24/2300339758/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=200202_district_update&source=200202_district_update"), please click the link. clean_body: Fighting what matters to our district | | Team, I grew up in our district and I still live here. In my career, I've had the chance to visit cities and towns across America, but between you and me, I still prefer our corner of Northeast Ohio. That's why, after so many years, I'm still fighting for the things that make our community special. I wanted to give you an update on the most important issues facing our community right now: 1. Trump recently announced he would break a central campaign promise and slash Social Security and Medicare benefits if re-elected. Social Security has lifted millions of older Ohioans out of poverty -- that's why I believe this vital program should be expanded, not cut. I 'm a proud cosponsor of the Social Security 2100 Act, which would expand benefits for all current and future Social Security recipients, while cutting taxes for over 10 million seniors and fully funding the program through the end of the century. 2. I'm leading the effort to secure a $200 million Advanced Technology Vehicles Manufacturing loan for Lordstown Motors , which will help update the former GM Lordstown Assembly Plant, manufacture electric pickup trucks and create hundreds of good-paying jobs. It's not enough to bring jobs back to our communities -- we need to build an economy that works for all of us. I 'm cosponsoring the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, which protects workers from exploitation, punishes employers who break the law, and grants hundreds of thousands of workers more collective bargaining power. We passed it in the House. And my WORKER Act , which fights the effects of automation, reinvests in our communities, and trains American workers for the jobs of the future, was just introduced in the Senate. Your support helps me continue to fight for the issues that matter to our community. "" Thanks for all you do, \-- Tim "" | | Meet Tim Ryan Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since. | | Tim Ryan for Congress** P.O. Box 189 Niles, Ohio 44446 "" "" Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress

This is just one example of Anthony Brindisi lying to the hard-working people of Upstate New York. He previously claimed to be bipartisan, but he only votes with President Trump 9.2% of the time.

He also said he wouldn’t support impeachment, then voted for it three times!

Our district elected President Trump by over 15%. We need elected officials who represent us, not ultra-liberal Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff. We deserve better.

**That’s why we need you to chip in before midnight to help us defeat Anthony Brindisi!**

People in Nevada are voting early _right now_.

And early voting has also started in North Carolina. And California. And Minnesota. And more! In fact, the states that are early voting while you read this email will account for _more than a thousand delegates_ in the Democratic primary.

**We don't have a moment to spare. To remain competitive on Super Tuesday, we need to raise $7 million before Saturday, so we can get Elizabeth's message to people who could cast their ballot at any moment.**

[**Will you chip in for the first time to this grassroots movement today? $2 or whatever you can give will go directly into critical organizing and advertising programs.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a9ae/45c30650/1ff3463c6/66e5af72/1400319674/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzFERl9FR0xfVk9UX1BfMjAyMDAyMThfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO1DF_EGL_VOT_P_20200218_V1S2_P") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

body:

| **Team -- The polls are officially open for early voting!** | **[FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](https://act.myngp.com/el/9EBr7hScM6J2klNaWAVBTGkMYgIPhpXhJbYpvftCqgw=/M5Ha-xMcC4GSYpWiWZpbz4eSqAf1mL9h8ULfAZvy-Yk=)**
---
We can't believe it! It feels like just yesterday that Al stood up and became the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump. Since then, we've grown our movement from one brave Representative to hundreds, passed impeachment in the House of Representatives, and consistently put country over party and justice over politics.
Because of our refusal to stay quiet in the face of greed and corruption, we were the targets of a record number of political and personal attacks. Republicans called Al every name in the book, and he even received threats and racial slurs.
**But we didn 't back down then, and we're not about to start now. Let's show the naysayers the strength of our movement at the ballot box. [Can you rush a last minute grassroots contribution to boost this movement to victory and re-elect Al?](https://act.myngp.com/el/9EBr7hScM6J2klNaWAVBTGkMYgIPhpXhJbYpvftCqgw=/_5W6J-IPgzbsaJvAlbFCHoQHawCVp8uKQ8dH9Qbycfk=?refcode=E1315-20200218-EarlyVotingToday-SL&amount=25)**

clean_body: | = | Team -- The polls are officially open for early voting! | = We can't believe it! It feels like just yesterday that Al stood up and became the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump. Since then, we've grown our movement from one brave Representative to hundreds, passed impeachment in the House of Representatives, and consistently put country over party and justice over politics. Because of our refusal to stay quiet in the face of greed and corruption, we were the targets of a record number of political and personal attacks. Republicans called Al every name in the book, and he even received threats and racial slurs. But we didn 't back down then, and we're not about to start now. Let's show the naysayers the strength of our movement at the ballot box. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | And remember, if you're registered in Texas, you can vote early from today until February 28th, OR in the primary election on March 3rd. Don't miss this opportunity to make your voice heard and help take our country back! name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: Trump Takes Track to Open Daytona 500
body:
“President Trump took to the track to open the Daytona 500 race Sunday,” making “about a quarter of a lap before pulling aside.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d2189248e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **WATCH: Trump Takes Track to Open Daytona 500**

“President Trump took to the track to open the Daytona 500 race Sunday,” making “about a quarter of a lap before pulling aside,” Rebecca Klar reports for _The Hill_.

“‘My fellow race fans, the Daytona 500 is a legendary display,’ he said after emerging to applause from the crowd. Trump thanked the ‘tens of thousands of patriots’ gathered at the Daytona International Speedway for the race, which he called ‘pure American glory.’”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99537394f8&e=3ee4985eea)

**WATCH** : [President Trump’s motorcade takes the track!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=914616ce70&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Ivanka Trump Sunday cemented her position as the global spokesperson for women's economic empowerment, telling a Middle East summit that efforts she and international banks have championed over the past two years could lead to a $7 trillion boost in world GDP,” Paul Bedard writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=09caee8232&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Daria Ortiz’s voice cracked when speaking at a White House event Friday, as she described how New York City’s ‘sanctuary city’ status let her family—and the rest of the city’s residents—down. Her 92-year-old grandmother, Maria Fuertes, a legal immigrant from the Dominican Republic, was sexually assaulted and killed last month, and police have charged illegal immigrant and alleged repeat criminal offender Reeaz Khan, 21,” Fred Lucas reports for [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=778928e86b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump campaigned in 2016 on a promise to fix global trade. “Phase one of the new trade deal with China will put an end to years of unfair Chinese trade practices,” while the NAFTA-replacing USMCA will “create over 176,000 new American jobs and promote fairer wages,” Texas Lt. Governor Dan Patrick writes in the [_Dallas Morning News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=27070e190b&e=3ee4985eea) _. _
---
|

subject: Not good enough!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
The Democratic National Committee is not listening to Nevada or South Carolina, friend. Voters in these two states help answer this important question for our Democratic candidates: **Can you build a broad, diverse coalition that unites voters to win in November?** By including only one poll from Nevada and _zero_ from South Carolina in debate qualification criteria for Wednesday night’s debate, the DNC is further marginalizing the diverse coalition that these voters represent. **Take action today to tell the DNC that early state voices must be heard by sharing the statement below on Facebook and Twitter using our easy-to-share buttons.** _Why isn't the DNC listening to voters in Nevada and South Carolina for the next #DemDebate? They've only allowed 1 poll from NV and 0 from SC. Not good enough, @TheDemocrats! #ListentoNV #ListentoSC_

clean_body: | | | | The Democratic National Committee is not listening to Nevada or South Carolina, friend. Voters in these two states help answer this important question for our Democratic candidates: Can you build a broad, diverse coalition that unites voters to win in November? By including only one poll from Nevada and zero from South Carolina in debate qualification criteria for Wednesday night’s debate, the DNC is further marginalizing the diverse coalition that these voters represent. Take action today to tell the DNC that early state voices must be heard by sharing the statement below on Facebook and Twitter using our easy-to-share buttons. Why isn't the DNC listening to voters in Nevada and South Carolina for the next #DemDebate? They've only allowed 1 poll from NV and 0 from SC. name: MJ Hegar
subject: Voting Started Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
As voters all over Texas make their voices heard at the ballot box, I'm so grateful to each and every one of you for supporting this campaign.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489059b/7f51f7bc/4dc30655/4ef1ba84/3864003193/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **Early Vote Goal:**
**We need your help to raise $20,000 by midnight!** **[**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489059b/7f51f7bc/4dc30655/4ef1bafa/3864003193/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-feb-mm-2020?refcode=email_20200218.2nd__939__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Early voting just started today, Peter! As voters all over Texas make their voices heard at the ballot box, I'm so grateful to each and every one of you for supporting this campaign.

Every dollar you've pitched in has allowed us to spread our message that much further. **[If you haven't pitched in yet, now's the time. With just two weeks left in this primary, I need your support now more than ever.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489059b/7f51f7bc/4dc30655/4ef1bafa/3864003193/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-feb-mm-2020?refcode=email_20200218.2nd__939__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

This primary is Texas' first opportunity to make it clear that we're done with politicians chosen by special interests. I know there are a lot of Texans out there like me -- fed up with politics as usual and ready for representatives who will fight for a better future for our kids.

But with only two weeks until the primary, our time to reach them -- and tell them about this campaign to tackle climate change, defend reproductive rights, and fight for a fair immigration system -- **_is running out_**.

**[Will you donate toward our $20,000 Early Vote Goal to help make sure we can reach undecided voters and tell them about our campaign?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489059b/7f51f7bc/4dc30655/4ef1bafa/3864003193/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-feb-mm-2020?refcode=email_20200218.2nd__939__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We need to raise $20,000 by midnight to run the strongest get out the vote campaign we can and show Sen. Cornyn that we've got serious momentum.

**So Peter, I'm asking you to give whatever you can before our early vote deadline:** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489059b/7f51f7bc/4dc30655/4ef1baf8/3864003193/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-feb-mm-2020?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200218.2nd__939__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489059b/7f51f7bc/4dc30655/4ef1bafe/3864003193/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-feb-mm-2020?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200218.2nd__939__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489059b/7f51f7bc/4dc30655/4ef1bafc/3864003193/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-feb-mm-2020?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200218.2nd__939__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489059b/7f51f7bc/4dc30655/4ef1baf3/3864003193/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-feb-mm-2020?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200218.2nd__939__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489059b/7f51f7bc/4dc30655/4ef1baf2/3864003193/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-feb-mm-2020?refcode=email_20200218.2nd__939__")**
Thanks for being part of this team, Peter.

\-- MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489059b/7f51f7bc/4dc30655/4ef1bafa/3864003193/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-feb-mm-2020?refcode=email_20200218.2nd__939__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Elizabeth needs your voice in this fight -- now more than ever before. Can you chip in $2 or anything you can to help fight for big, structural change?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Donald Trump has been president for 3 years, and there's a lot at stake in this next election. This election is for the children who have to go through lockdown drills at school. It's for the families | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a9bb/45c30650/1ff13edde/66e454cd/459864714/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Donald Trump has been president for 3 years, and there's a lot at stake in this next election.

This election is for the children who have to go through lockdown drills at school. It's for the families separated at the border. It's for the women, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community, and anyone else who is marginalized under this administration.

It's easy to give into our fear and vote for ideas that only nibble around the edges of the problems our country faces today. But when we give up on big ideas, we give up on the people those big ideas are meant to help.

**This is not a time for small ideas. This is a time to fight.**

Elizabeth is not afraid. And to win this election, take back the White House, and fight for big, structural change in 2021, we can't be either.

**If you've been waiting for a good time to get in the fight, it's now.** Elizabeth needs you now more than ever -- and with the Nevada caucuses coming up in just a few days, your support would have a major impact on the future of this race.

**[Elizabeth needs your voice in this fight-- and with only a few days left to reach our goal of $7 million, we need your help more than ever before. Can you chip in $2 or anything you can to help fight for big, structural change?
](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a9bb/45c30650/1ff13edde/66e454cc/459864714/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzFFRl9FR1JfQlNDX0NfMjAyMDAyMThfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO1EF_EGR_BSC_C_20200218_V1S3_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

It's for the families | | | "" Donald Trump has been president for 3 years, and there's a lot at stake in this next election. This election is for the children who have to go through lockdown drills at school. It's for the families separated at the border. It's for the women, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community, and anyone else who is marginalized under this administration. It's easy to give into our fear and vote for ideas that only nibble around the edges of the problems our country faces today. But when we give up on big ideas, we give up on the people those big ideas are meant to help. This is not a time for small ideas. This is a time to fight. Elizabeth is not afraid. And to win this election, take back the White House, and fight for big, structural change in 2021, we can't be either. If you've been waiting for a good time to get in the fight, it's now. Elizabeth needs you now more than ever -- and with the Nevada caucuses coming up in just a few days, your support would have a major impact on the future of this race. ---
| Peter, I wanted to invite you to a special election night watch party we are hosting for top supporters of President Trump on March 3rd, Super Tuesday.

The location is still to be determined, but we are going to meet at 7pm after the polls close and watch the results come in as President Trump's incredible leadership is affirmed in state after state.

There will be refreshments and plenty of good company with fellow patriots at the event. I hope you'll attend! [**Please sign up for free tickets at the Eventbrite link on the Facebook event linked above and below so we can get an accurate headcount.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f6a80c15aa&e=795c6d9796)

Can't wait to see you there. Thank you for standing strong for liberty and our President! Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=2a62d85e22&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Sanctuaries for whom?
body:
Maria Fuertes was raped and murdered last month in Queens, New York. She was 92. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2fc7ac4891&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 18, 2020
---
| | |
# **Sanctuaries for whom?**

**“My grandmother** was very generous and educated,” Daria Ortiz said. “She’s a shining example of when people come legally to this country, work hard, and do the right thing and are law-abiding citizens.”

**Maria Fuertes** , Ortiz’s grandmother, was raped and murdered last month in Queens, New York. She was 92.

**Police charged illegal immigrant** and alleged repeat criminal offender Reeaz Khan with Maria’s murder. Khan, from Guyana, had been arrested previously for assault. New York City released him from jail despite a detainer request from U.S. immigration officials.

**WATCH:** [Border Security is National Security!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=11f1bdae4c&e=3ee4985eea "https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1228458641658908672")

**Across the country** , left-wing politicians use these so-called “sanctuary” policies to put dangerous, often violent criminals back on our streets. After all, “sanctuary cities” have nothing to do with protecting law-abiding immigrants: Their purpose is to stop the United States from deporting illegal aliens with criminal charges and convictions.

**“The man** that is responsible for this should have never had the opportunity to do this, had his multiple offenses not been ignored,” Ortiz said of her grandmother’s killer. “The system not only failed our family, but it failed our city.”

**Ortiz joined President Trump** at a White House event Friday to honor heroes from the U.S. Border Patrol. She thanked the Administration for acknowledging her family’s tragedy while so many others ignore the human cost of sanctuary cities.

**“Not one more** American life should be stolen by sanctuary cities,” President Trump told her. “That’s why we’re calling on Congress to pass legislation giving American victims the right to sue sanctuary cities and hold them accountable for the suffering and the damages that they’ve caused.”

[President Trump: Politicians want sanctuary cities—our citizens do not.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c176d2731b&e=3ee4985eea)

📺 **Acting DHS Secretary:** [President Trump is securing our border ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=576d8f54f4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **🎬** **President Trump gives the signal at Daytona 500!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e73dc9f04&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **The****President and First Lady** rode into the Daytona 500 in style on Sunday, taking a lap in the presidential state car before addressing the crowd.

**“The tens of thousands** of patriots here today have come for the fast cars and the world-class motor sports,” President Trump said, “but NASCAR fans never forget that no matter who wins the race, what matters most is God, family, and country.”

**During the final lap, **driver Ryan Newman’s car flipped over in a terrible accident. President Trump wrote on Twitter that he was praying for Ryan, calling him a “great and brave NASCAR driver.”

[In photos: The President and First Lady take a lap in “The Beast”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c923a779d8&e=3ee4985eea "https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1229178152351600644")

She was 92. Police charged illegal immigrant and alleged repeat criminal offender Reeaz Khan with Maria’s murder. Khan, from Guyana, had been arrested previously for assault. New York City released him from jail despite a detainer request from U.S. immigration officials. name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: My insight on the primaries
body:
Peter,
Twelve years ago, I won the Iowa caucuses. It was a substantial victory and one that shocked the so-called professionals of the press. All of whom expected Mitt Romney to win, and I beat him by over nine points.
Well, a week later, Senator John McCain won in New Hampshire, and the week after that, he and I were locked in a dead heat in South Carolina. He had really strong support in the low country around Charleston. My strongest support was in upstate around Greenville and Spartanburg.
Then a rare snow blanketed the upstate, and McCain, who had said he would drop out if he lost in South Carolina, squeaked past me to win two of the three early contests. Even though I won the majority of states on Super Tuesday, by then, the press decided the race was over.
And as they reported it that way, contributions to my campaign disappeared and flowed freely to his. Things might have been very different if I had won the first two of three contests, but maybe not.
**The purpose of this intensely personal story is to say that as Democrats continue to vote and select their 2020 nominee, you’re going to hear many of the talking heads say that Iowa, or New Hampshire, or South Carolina or Nevada (which are the first four contests) that they really don’t mean that much.**
The difference between those people and me, I’ve actually competed in the arena and played the game. They’ve only watched from the comfort of the press box. And I can promise you that the early contests do matter.
**Democrats would like us all to forget about their fiasco in Iowa, where they were unable to promptly calculate the election results. Eventually, Buttigieg claimed victory and in New Hampshire, Bernie Sanders took home the most delegates.**
However, after the next two contests the media will likely declare one candidate a front runner and the presumptive nominee, and they, and not the voters, will narrow the field.
I encourage you to listen carefully to what the media is saying and watch what happens in these next couple of early states to see who the Democrats will make their starting quarterback.
And while the Democrats are trying to pick their own nominee, they have been busier than ever in Washington trying to impeach and ultimately remove President Trump from office, so as to overturn the 2016 election results.
Remember that for all the drama in Congress and on TV, telling you who will win, they really know very little, and they usually get it all wrong.
I hope you won’t forget that no matter how much the elites in Congress and the media want to cancel your vote, it’s your vote that still decides it.
So vote. And drive the media, who look down their noses at you, even nuttier than they already are. And don’t just vote, but help mobilize others to the polls. When we stand united, we will be heard loud and clear in November.
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200218apl01nd&n=1)
**P.S.[Please consider making a special donation to our 2020 plan](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200218apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200218apl01nd&n=2) \- underway right now - to mobilize one million non-voting Christians to stand for biblical values at the polls in November. The Christian vote matters, and it’s up to us to turn out the vote.**
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200218apl01nd&n=3).

subject: Where's Ernst?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
We need a senator who will protect healthcare from special interests. That's why we stand with Admiral Franken. He won't support restrictions on access. He won't cut funding. And he'll stand up to any
|
---
| |
---

| | Iowans cannot trust Joni Ernst and Donald Trump to protect their health insurance. In the President's 2021 budget, Trump is proposing cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security -- a trifecta of essential programs for Iowa's families. And we know that Joni will vote anyway Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell will tell her to. **We need a senator who will protect healthcare from special interests. That 's why we stand with Admiral Franken. He won't support restrictions on access. He won't cut funding. And he'll stand up to anyone who would. ** [_**But he can 't win without your support. Can you chip in right now? **_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ea/33365068/4a6dfd0d/3f8be246/1370630724/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200218_medicare_em_fr_all_L1&amount=10") **As you well know, Mike is a fan of smart policy and breaking things down by the numbers:**
* _Our state has nearly 650,000 Iowans who receive some form of Social Security. Nearly half a million of these citizens paid into the system their entire life and 77,000 of them are disabled._

* _613,000 Iowans are enrolled in Medicaid and 77,000 children rely on Childhood Health Insurance Program (CHIP) benefits._

* _And a staggering 20% of Iowans are covered by Medicare._

Cutting and restricting such essential benefits is cruel and targets the most vulnerable among us. But as Joni remains quiet in public, she tells her donors it's time to make changes to funding these programs. No one can expect an explanation from her -- except her friends and donors. [_**Help us elect Mike Franken. He 'll never back down when it comes to protecting Iowans' access to essential benefits. **_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ea/33365068/4a6dfd0d/3f8be247/1370630724/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200218_medicare_em_fr_all_L2&amount=10") | [Chip In Here >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ea/33365068/4a6dfd0d/3f8be240/1370630724/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200218_medicare_em_fr_all_btn&amount=10")

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=d91ad92b844e4701960247638930a4a4&_e=hbNFNZRaQVG0d2ipXzKaj1s8YA_2-76NjtFVRiFh4ov8T0HmR5n3hVX3zxIHv0KJzda7k_UKyHSZhQivabhs_TfKKo1cio6tPSwlD0-4FuJFRrXFNs_CHQpTGlUGNJcPZNZOrs1WwI6nsyBbKyeSwpekXDJkSPjUjsvkVpli_Rhul365Ovp4cqMjqQH-aJOW026Tob7rOG0M07b_u6MShf4vnZ9pXpXskwla40_UwF3R09k4P2AOiOk7c0I6U2xD3JtYpT7kVLK87q7rW6PhPw%3D%3D) Our campaign is seeing a groundswell of excitement across the country. In a nationwide poll published this morning, Mike hit 19% support. That’s a 15-point jump since December -- a surge that shows where the momentum and energy are in this race. The most important news of all? Our rapidly growing support means we qualified to join tomorrow night’s DNC debate. It’s the biggest opportunity we’ve had so far for voters everywhere to hear directly from Mike, and see why he’s the one who can beat Donald Trump. Mike wants you to be a part of this with him. Text **NEVADA** to **80510** to get updates during the debate, direct from our team. Mike is looking forward to joining the other Democratic candidates on stage and making the case for why he's the best candidate to defeat Donald Trump and unite the country. This is a huge moment for what we’re building together. Text **NEVADA** to **80510** right now to be part of this with us. Let's get it done. Kevin Sheekey
Campaign Manager, Mike Bloomberg 2020

name: Tina Smith
subject: I mean it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200218-ty?refcode=em200218-ty&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Folks, I know we're coming right off of a long weekend, so I'll keep this one short:

**Thanks to your generous support, we reached our mid-quarter fundraising goal, and we're on track for our first FEC deadline of the year.**

I really mean it when I say we couldn't have done it without you.

You power this campaign, and I'm so grateful to know every day that you're with me. After all, I wouldn't be in this fight if it wasn't for folks like you chipping in whatever you can afford, volunteering your time, and taking action when it's needed most.

But we cannot afford to take our foot off the gas quite yet. There are many big fights ahead, and our work to save Minnesota's Senate seat and flip the majority will be one of the most consequential tasks of our lifetimes.

Not to mention, our first FEC deadline of the year is just around the corner and the numbers we end up with will give us our resources for the critical months ahead. Good or bad.

So, I'll be in touch soon on how you can continue supporting our campaign, but for now: Thank you, thank you, thank you for everything you have already done.

Yours,

Tina | [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200218-ty?refcode=em200218-ty&amount=10&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&")

I really mean it when I say we couldn't have done it without you. You power this campaign, and I'm so grateful to know every day that you're with me. After all, I wouldn't be in this fight if it wasn't for folks like you chipping in whatever you can afford, volunteering your time, and taking action when it's needed most. But we cannot afford to take our foot off the gas quite yet. There are many big fights ahead, and our work to save Minnesota's Senate seat and flip the majority will be one of the most consequential tasks of our lifetimes. Not to mention, our first FEC deadline of the year is just around the corner and the numbers we end up with will give us our resources for the critical months ahead. Good or bad. So, I'll be in touch soon on how you can continue supporting our campaign, but for now: Thank you, thank you, thank you for everything you have already done. Yours, Tina | "=&"
